SELECT CASE [a].[Status]
    WHEN 0 THEN N'Scheduled'
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Confirmed'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Completed'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Cancelled'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'NoShow'
    ELSE CAST([a].[Status] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Status], COUNT(*) AS [Count]
FROM [Appointments] AS [a]
GROUP BY [a].[Status]

SELECT CASE [a].[Status]
    WHEN 0 THEN N'Scheduled'
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Confirmed'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Completed'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Cancelled'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'NoShow'
    ELSE CAST([a].[Status] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Status], COUNT(*) AS [Count]
FROM [Appointments] AS [a]
GROUP BY [a].[Status]

    WHEN 0 THEN N'Scheduled'

SELECT CASE [a].[Status]
    WHEN 0 THEN N'Scheduled'
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Confirmed'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Completed'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Cancelled'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'NoShow'
    ELSE CAST([a].[Status] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Status], COUNT(*) AS [Count]
FROM [Appointments] AS [a]
GROUP BY [a].[Status]

    SELECT [a0].[AppointmentId], [a0].[AppointmentDate], [a0].[AppointmentTime], [a0].[ClinicId], [a0].[CreatedAt], [a0].[DoctorId], [a0].[DurationMinutes], [a0].[Notes], [a0].[PatientId], [a0].[ReasonForVisit], [a0].[Status], [a0].[UpdatedAt], [d].[DoctorId] AS [DoctorId0], [d].[Bio], [d].[ConsultationFee], [d].[IsAvailable], [d].[LicenseNumber], [d].[SpecializationId], [d].[UserId], [d].[WorkingDays], [d].[YearsOfExperience], [a1].[Id], [a1].[AccessFailedCount], [a1].[Address], [a1].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a1].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a1].[DateOfBirth], [a1].[Email], [a1].[EmailConfirmed], [a1].[FullName], [a1].[Gender], [a1].[IsActive], [a1].[LockoutEnabled], [a1].[LockoutEnd], [a1].[NormalizedEmail], [a1].[NormalizedUserName], [a1].[PasswordHash], [a1].[PhoneNumber], [a1].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a1].[ProfilePicture], [a1].[SecurityStamp], [a1].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a1].[UserName]

SELECT CASE [a].[Status]
    WHEN 0 THEN N'Scheduled'
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Confirmed'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Completed'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Cancelled'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'NoShow'
    ELSE CAST([a].[Status] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Status], COUNT(*) AS [Count]
FROM [Appointments] AS [a]
GROUP BY [a].[Status]
